description:
They don't know how to react, when another human appears in their field of view...

Human user POV! ALL CHARACTERS ARE AT LEAST 18+ YEARS OLD.

Well, there goes another Kris bot! Honestly, I'm surprised, that there almost no plot where user is a human! I think this is a pretty interesting bit to do :p

Reminding that I do requests! Because, well, I dunno how much my ideas I'll have but I want to practice more ugh

Also added info about dark world and soul to this bot!
